faqs.question: How much does fly control cost in Kips Bay?
faqs.answer: Fly control services in Kips Bay typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the severity of the infestation, property size, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and transparent pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: What types of flies are common in Kips Bay apartments?
faqs.answer: Kips Bay residents commonly encounter fruit flies, drain flies, and house flies. Fruit flies are attracted to produce and fermenting materials, drain flies breed in organic buildup in pipes, and house flies enter through windows and doors, especially in buildings near restaurants or medical facilities.
